description: A candid color photograph, the second image in the same 'Back on the world stage' tweet, shot from inside/beside the Marine One helicopter looking out across the South Lawn toward the South Portico of the White House under a clear blue sky. The neoclassical curved colonnade and balcony of the White House fill the center background, with a large American flag flying from a pole at right and a crowd of onlookers gathered behind a rope line. President Donald Trump, in a dark suit with a gold/yellow tie, walks across the lawn in the foreground and raises his hand toward his face (waving or shielding his eyes). Part of the dark helicopter doorframe and handrails frame the left edge of the shot. It is an unedited professional event photograph with no added text, slogans, or design elements. Intent: a grand, patriotic departure image; a plain news photo, not a designed graphic.
